name: Salmon Skin Salad
description_short: A savory salad featuring crispy salmon skin.
description_long: This salad provides a crisp and savory experience with its toasted salmon skin. It offers a balance of textures and fresh greens.

name: Wasabi Shrimp
description_short: Fried shrimp with a kick of wasabi.
description_long: These shrimp are lightly fried and paired with a subtle wasabi heat. They offer a rich and crispy texture with a spicy undertone. Ideal for sharing.

name: Fried Calamari
description_long: Tender squid is coated and fried until golden brown. This dish highlights a satisfying crunch with a savory finish.

name: Spicy Crawfish Salad
description_short: A vibrant salad mixed with spicy crawfish.
description_long: This salad features seasoned crawfish combined with crisp greens. It provides a savory flavor paired with a noticeable spicy kick.

name: Jalapeño Yellowtail
description_short: Fresh yellowtail topped with sliced jalapeño.
description_long: Delicate slices of raw yellowtail are brightened by the heat of jalapeño. This dish highlights the rich texture of the fish with a sharp, fresh bite.

name: Tako (Octopus)
description_short: Firm and mildly sweet slices of cooked octopus.
description_long: This offering highlights the unique, firm texture of octopus.

name: Surf Clam
description_short: Sliced surf clam with a firm, chewy texture.
description_long: Surf clam offers a distinct visual appeal. It brings a mild, sweet flavor.

review_notes: Mapped surf clam to nearest protein: scallop. Sashimi surcharge applies.

name: Amaebi (Sweet Shrimp w/ Head)
description_short: Raw sweet shrimp served with its head.
description_long: This premium raw shrimp is prized for its soft, sweet profile.
cultural_note: Prized in Japanese sushi for its delicate sweetness.

name: Ikura (Salmon Roe)
description_long: These vibrant orange pearls provide a satisfying pop of umami and brine.

name: Tobiko (Flying Fish Roe)
description_short: Crunchy and colorful flying fish roe.
description_long: Tobiko adds a bright, crunchy texture to sushi.

name: Hibachi Teriyaki Filet Mignon
description_short: Grilled filet mignon served with a flavorful hibachi finish.
description_long: This dish features tender filet mignon seared to perfection.

name: Hibachi Teriyaki Scallop
description_short: Seared scallops with a rich teriyaki glaze.
description_long: These scallops are grilled to achieve a tender, satisfying bite.

name: Miso Soup
description_long: A warm, comforting bowl of miso broth. It features subtle umami notes with a light, soothing finish.
